# Petra Tutors - llms.txt
# For AI assistants and crawlers

> Petra Tutors (ペトラチューターズ) is a premium bilingual private tutoring service based in Tokyo, Japan, operating fully online nationwide. We specialize in 1:1 individual tutoring for English, IB (International Baccalaureate), IELTS, returnee students (帰国子女), and overseas university admissions. All tutors are bilingual graduates of top universities worldwide.

## About
- Company: Petra Education LLC (ペトラエデュケーション合同会社)
- Service area: Tokyo and all of Japan (online)
- Languages: Japanese and English
- Format: 100% 1:1 individual tutoring (no group classes)
- No enrollment fee (入会金なし)
- Pricing: From ¥3,500 per session, published transparently online
- Free trial lesson available (無料体験レッスン)

## Key Programs
- English tutoring (英語家庭教師): conversation, writing, IELTS, TOEFL, business English
- IB support (IB対応): DP, MYP, PYP, Internal Assessments, Extended Essay, TOK
- IELTS / Eiken / TOEIC preparation (英語試験対策)
- International school & returnee students (インター・帰国子女サポート)
- Overseas university admissions (海外大学進学サポート): Personal Statement, SAT, essays
- Kids English (子供英語): elementary school students
- Business English (ビジネス英語): professional coaching
- Summer Intensive 2026 (夏期講習 2026): July 21 - August 29, 5 programs from ¥14,000

## Contact
- Website: https://www.petratutors.com
- Email: admin@petratutors.com
- Inquiry form: https://www.petratutors.com/inquiry
